description: The rest of the team stays on Zephyr One, interrogating Gerald Sharpe for intel about security and Project Helius. Sharpe is obstinate and openly racist, resisting Mack and Yo-Yo's questioning, and trying to intimidate them. The awkward and heated encounter underscores the difficulties the team faces working in this time period, especially for their non-white members.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: We know exactly who you are. Now tell us, who determines security access?
I'd answer her. Who can get to Helius? Look. We know you're not the bad guy. But you may have given access to one, so help us out.
Okay! Okay. Okay, I'll tell you. When hell freezes over. I'm a loyal American. Did you really think that I would break for bush league commie scum like you?
We're trying to prevent something terrible from happening.
And by “terrible”, do you mean America's continued dominance and unparalleled excellence?
That arrogance is putting lives at risk.
Oh, is that so, Mamacita? Ooh. Caliente. Good thing your boy's here to keep you in line.
Did he just call me boy?
Allow me to introduce myself. Gerald Sharpe. Department of Defense. Ex-military. I didn't just teach interrogation and resistance, I wrote the field manual. So... do your worst.
